blockingIssues.description: `images.generate_stream()` / `images.edit_stream()` buffer the full SSE body before returning, so partial image events are replayed only after the request finishes instead of streaming incrementally to callers.

`ImageGenerationAccumulator::finish` and `ImageEditAccumulator::finish` accept EOF-truncated streams as successful unless `[DONE]` was seen, so missing terminal `image_generation.completed` / `image_edit.completed` events can slip through as clean completion.

`audio.transcriptions.stream()` returns success for EOF-truncated transcription streams even when no terminal `transcript.text.done` event was observed, violating the repository's terminal-event streaming rule.
`ChatCompletionContentPart::image_url(..., detail)` reuses an `ImageDetail` enum that includes `Original`, allowing `/chat/completions` requests to serialize unsupported `detail="original"` values.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify the brainstorming/design-comparison requirement for new public resource families in Exec Mode: either require an explicit `brainstorming` invocation or require a handoff section naming the chosen and rejected API design options, and ensure `followedProcedure` is false when neither happens.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Both `images-surface` and `audio-transcription-translation-and-speech` introduced public media families, but their transcript skeletons lacked a `brainstorming` step and their handoffs did not record chosen-vs-rejected design alternatives, while `skillFeedback.followedProcedure` still reported true. Review reports: `.factory/validation/media/scrutiny/reviews/images-surface.json` and `.factory/validation/media/scrutiny/reviews/audio-transcription-translation-and-speech.json`.

rejectedObservations.observation: The audio review repeated the same `sdk-surface-worker` brainstorming ambiguity observation already captured from the images review.
Add another shared-type convention note warning against reusing partially overlapping enums across families.
rejectedObservations.reason: already-documented in mission `AGENTS.md` and `.factory/library/architecture.md`, which already say shared types should only be used when truly shared.
